Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: timeout explicite 55s pour éviter analyses bloquées indéfiniment

Sur Vercel Hobby (cap 60s), si l'IA dépasse 55s :
- Kimi K2 : AbortController sur le fetch → erreur propre
- Gemini : Promise.race → erreur propre
Le catch dans actions/analyse.ts peut alors passer status = 'error'
au lieu de laisser l'analyse coincée en 'processing' indéfiniment.

commit.message:
fix(auto-update): track main branch commit SHA instead of release tags

_auto_update() was always returning early because the repo has no GitHub
release tags, so /releases/latest never returned a tag_name. Switch to
fetching the latest commit SHA on main via /commits/main — this works
regardless of whether release tags exist. install() and the update case
also now write the short commit SHA to .version so the comparison is
meaningful on subsequent boots.

Also fires an ES notification after a silent background update so the
user knows an update was applied.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

MVP仕様に全面リファクタ（13項目対応）

- AI食事分析: 食事内容テキスト+総カロリーの2値表示、両方ユーザー編集可能
- 食事登録: 撮影/アップロード/手入力の3パターン対応
- 食事区分: 朝食/昼食/夕食/間食をドロップダウンで選択
- 目標カロリー: ユーザー自身が設定する仕様に変更
- 運動: 種目ごと固定カロリー表示、種目名統一（腕立て伏せ→筋トレ）
- 医師コメント: ホーム→最小通知、医師タブに一覧集約（一方向掲示板）
- 動画: カテゴリUI削除、シンプル一覧のみ
- 文言統一: チャット/返信→コメント、医療スタッフ→担当医
- 不要機能削除: クイズCSS残骸、通知設定、承認UI、ヘルプ
- 記録ボタン押下まで保存しない旨を明記

feat: add TTY-based session-to-pane correlation for conductor

Resolves session misattribution when multiple Claude agents share the
same CWD by tracing the process chain (claude → TTY → tmux → WezTerm
pane) instead of relying solely on CWD matching.

Also syncs wezterm config (liquid glass theme, live opacity/blur sliders,
conductor keybind, status bar caching) and zshrc (NVM lazy-load cleanup).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Close h_flux sorry: 6→5 sorry's in CoulombConcreteTheorem42

- Add `coulomb_flux_component_bound` lemma to CoulombFlux.lean (~130 lines):
  combines Newtonian potential bounds with polynomial gradient bound (hGradBound)
  to show |flux_i(v)| ≤ Cf * g(v) * (1+‖v‖)^Kg
- Close h_flux sorry using the new lemma, completing hIBP_f_dg proof
  (all 4 sub-parts now proved: h_score, h_flux, measurability, combining step)
- Fix CoulombPSD.lean import: CoulombKernel → CoulombFlux
- Mark landau_ibp_f_dg Aristotle job as proved_manually

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: number() function, Quantity×Currency coercion, and Services P&L rewrite

Add number() function across the full 8-layer stack (lexer, parser,
classifier, detector, semantic spec, interpreter, feature registry) to
extract raw numeric values from any typed quantity. Add Quantity × Currency
coercion in both operand orderings so headcount can multiply directly
against compensation.

Rewrite the Services P&L example (.cm and Hugo page) to use people
quantities on headcount, number() for unit-stripping in capacity and
per-head calculations, and Quantity×Currency coercion in labor cost.
Every constant now has prose context explaining what it is, why that
value, and sourced benchmarks (SPI Research, TSIA, GBTA, ATD, Carta,
Glassdoor, Levels.fyi, G2). T&E derived from trip counts × costs
instead of hard-coded. Hugo page split into small, well-annotated
code blocks with full exposition of every section.

Add new-calcmark-feature skill documenting the 8-layer TDD pattern.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add model evaluation framework with multi-season testing, odds integration, and Bayesian Poisson model

- Walk-forward out-of-sample evaluation of 5 models (Dixon-Coles, ELO, Bayesian Poisson, Composite, Market)
- Multi-season support (?season=multi) testing across 780 matches (2023-26)
- Market closing line (Pinnacle) as benchmark model with CLV computation
- Ted Variance overlay comparison showing impact on each base model
- Bayesian Poisson model with Gamma-Poisson shrinkage (Mack's approach)
- Walk-forward xG filtering to prevent look-ahead bias in Ted
- Auto-save results to data/evaluations/ + Vercel Blob save endpoint
- Full UI with scorecard, calibration, game log, methodology tabs
- Streamlined nav bar

commit.message:
Unificar navbar HTML en las 79 páginas: mismo bloque exacto en toda la web

13 páginas tenían el <li> de Destinos + dropdown eliminado por completo,
haciendo que "Destinos" desapareciera del menú. Otras tenían diferencias
menores (líneas en blanco, hamburguesa en una línea).

Solución definitiva: reemplazar el bloque <nav>...</nav> completo en
todas las páginas con el navbar canónico de la home, verificando que
las 79 páginas quedan idénticas.

commit.message:
fix(dashboard): gate API queries behind auth and suppress 401 error messages

- Sidebar queries (config, health, pipeline) only fire when authenticated
- 401 responses from apiFetch marked with isAuthError flag
- QueryClient skips retry on auth errors
- ConfigurationPage hides error card for auth errors
- Unauthenticated users see login page cleanly without error flashes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden OAuth 2.0: fix PKCE bypass, open redirect, token leakage + 5 high-severity issues

Critical fixes:
- PKCE code_verifier now mandatory when code_challenge stored (was skippable)
- redirect_uri validated against registered client at authorize + token endpoints
- Per-session access tokens replace raw MCP_API_KEY exposure

High fixes:
- Rate limit /register (5/min), /token (10/min), /authorize (10/min)
- Size caps + TTL cleanup on all in-memory OAuth dicts
- CORS restricted from wildcard to claude.ai/anthropic.com origins
- Auth code bound to client_id at /token time
- CSRF token on OAuth consent form (10-min TTL)

🚀 Initial release: ClickDz FREE SHOP Backend v1.0.0

Production-ready e-commerce backend for the Algerian market.

Features:
- 58 wilayas + 1541 communes (full Algeria geography)
- 5 payment gateways: Chargily, SlickPay, Stripe, CCP/BaridiMob, COD
- 4 shipping providers: Yalidine, ZR Express, EMS Poste, Maystro + Manual
- Full REST API: auth, products, categories, cart, orders, reviews, coupons
- Admin dashboard: stats, order management, shipping rates, CSV export
- JWT auth (access + refresh tokens), Zod validation, rate limiting
- Docker + Docker Compose (app + PostgreSQL + Redis)
- Trilingual support (ar/fr/en)

Tech stack: Express + TypeScript + Prisma + PostgreSQL + Redis

feat: auto-discover pages from homepage links when no sitemap exists

Sites without a sitemap.xml were only getting 1-5 pages checked, inflating
scores. Now extractAllInternalLinks() scrapes up to 30 internal links from
the full homepage HTML as a fallback, ensuring realistic scoring even for
sites with no sitemap.

Tested: aircall.io went from 5 pages (score 70) to 32 pages (score 40).

579 tests passing (13 new).

commit.message:
fix(frontend): use correct JS unicode escapes for emoji in LoadingState

\U is a Python convention — JavaScript needs \u{XXXXX} for codepoints
above U+FFFF. The fire and eyes emoji were rendering as raw text
"U0001F525" and "U0001F440" instead of 🔥 and 👀.

fix(cmd-palette): disable cmdk built-in filtering for dynamic entity search

static navigation items.

Add admin custom offers — Fiverr-style payment links

Admin can create a custom offer (title, description, price, service type,
duration), send it to a client's email, and the project is created
automatically when the client pays via Stripe checkout.

page with pay button, offer checkout API, webhook handler for offer
payments, branded offer email template, pending offers dashboard alert.

feat: 初始化 botzone-neo（NestJS judger 基础架构）

- NestJS + TypeScript strict 项目骨架
- 评测模块：Bull 队列 + MatchRunner 对局主控
- 策略模式：RestartStrategy（每轮重启）+ LongrunStrategy（骨架）
- nsjail 沙箱封装（配置构建 + 进程管理）
- 编译模块：C++/Python/TypeScript + LRU 文件缓存
- 数据持久化：data/globaldata 文件存储
- 回调服务：update/finish HTTP 回报
- 多语言 Bot/Judge 模板（C++、Python、TypeScript）
- Docker 多阶段构建 + docker-compose（judger + mariadb + redis）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ci: fix Leptonica .pc filename on Windows cross-compile

CMake's file(GENERATE) appends the build configuration suffix
(e.g. _Release) to the .pc filename when using a toolchain file.
This produces lept_Release.pc instead of lept.pc, breaking the
Requires.private chain from tesseract.pc.

Rename any lept_*.pc to lept.pc after install.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(omnifocus-manager): exclude tasks from completed/dropped parent projects

ofo-list.js used task.completed/task.dropped which only checks the task
itself, not its parent project. Tasks nested inside completed or dropped
projects (e.g. 2022 "Work Closing Routine") leaked into overdue/flagged/
today results. Switch to effectivelyCompleted/effectivelyDropped which
respects parent status.

Also updates api_reference.md and automation_best_practices.md with
correct patterns and a critical warning, and trims SKILL.md for
conciseness (257→209 lines). Bumps to v7.0.1.

Harden self-protection and fix reinstall hook path

  modifications (covers npm global install case)

- Replace stale hooks on reinstall instead of skipping when path differs
